cit.note: Standard company rate 27% (reduced from 28% effective 1 April 2022; years of assessment ending on or after 31 March 2023)

income_tax_2024_25.note: SARS 2024/25 individual income tax tables; tax year 1 March 2024 to 28 February 2025

vat.note: Standard rate 15%; zero-rated supplies include basic foodstuffs, exported goods, international transport; exempt includes residential accommodation, educational services

dividends_tax.note: 20% withheld at source by company; reduced by applicable double tax agreements

sdl.note: Skills Development Levy 1% of leviable amount; paid to SARS; exempt if leviable amount < ZAR 500,000/year

uif.note: Unemployment Insurance Fund: 1% employer + 1% employee of remuneration; capped at ZAR 17,712/month contribution ceiling

capital_gains_tax.note: 40% of net capital gain included in individual taxable income; 80% for companies; then taxed at normal rate
